summary: Frontend-only verification of FieldSnap Pro editor header revision. All 8 requested behaviours pass. Header now renders 6 controls in the correct order (close, title+pencil, zoom-reset, undo, redo, save-outline) with the new `editor-header-save-button` (Ionicons save-outline, blue #0A2463 background, 44x44). Both the new header save button and the existing bottom `editor-save-button` invoke the same `save` handler (verified via source: line 600 and line 836 both `onPress={save}` — no duplicated logic). SafeAreaView edges are correctly restricted to ['top','left','right'] and `toolbarWrap` applies `paddingBottom: Math.max(insets.bottom, spacing.sm) + spacing.md` for adaptive bottom buffer (line 716). Tool order Move→Marker→Text→Circle→Arrow→Rect→Draw verified in DOM. Text tool shows text-invert-off/on chips only (no color palette); Arrow/other tools show color palette only (no invert chips). Undo/redo start disabled (aria-disabled=true). Home / Gallery / Settings / Privacy all load without runtime errors. Non-blocking console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' emitted from the stamp/watermark overlays (View props) — cosmetic RN-Web deprecation, not a functional issue.

react_native_issues.issue: Uses deprecated `pointerEvents` prop on View instead of `style.pointerEvents`. Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/editor.tsx:675 and :683

action_items: (Optional cosmetic) Replace `pointerEvents="none"` prop with `style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}` (or add to existing style array) on the stamp overlay View (editor.tsx:675) and watermark overlay View (editor.tsx:683) to clear the RN-Web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Both header and bottom save controls reuse the same `save` handler with matching `disabled={saving}` guard — no risk of double-invocation state divergence.

`toolbarWrap` bottom padding formula `Math.max(insets.bottom, spacing.sm) + spacing.md` correctly guarantees a non-zero buffer on devices without a home indicator while respecting inset on notched devices.
SafeAreaView edges array `['top','left','right']` is intentional and consistent with the manual bottom-padding approach — good.
seed_data_creation: None. Editor tested with an external picsum.photos URL passed as `uri` param to exercise the header/toolbar layout only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editor header now has 6 testIDs including `editor-header-save-button` (blue). Bottom `editor-save-button` unchanged. Tap-through of header save button on web triggers `save()` — with the fake picsum URL it silently no-ops (imageLoaded may be false for cross-origin). Real save flow (captureRef + FileSystem + MediaLibrary) cannot be exercised in Expo web preview and needs a real device.
